label.minecraft_speedrun_timer.coordinat: Coordinates are rendered above the hotbar.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.singlep: This mod submits records only from singleplayer worlds.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.world_u: Could not identify this world. The run will not be submitted.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.must_cr: Create a new world through the tournament world creation flow to start a run.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.world_u: This world has already been opened. Create a new world for a valid run.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.world_l: Could not lock this world as used. The run will not be submitted.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.cheats_: Cheats are enabled. This run will not be submitted.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.difficu: Difficulty must stay Normal. This run will not be submitted.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.surviva: Game mode must stay Survival. This run will not be submitted.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.token_r: Open the auth screen and save the mod token before the run.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.submit_: Dragon defeated, but the mod was not authorized.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.contact: Failed to contact the leaderboard site.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.submit_: Failed to submit the run to the site.
Run successfully submitted to the website!
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.token_e: Token expired. Refresh it in your account.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.token_n: Token was not accepted. Refresh it in your account.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.stream_: Runs only count while streaming in the Minecraft category.
Could not verify the Twitch stream. Try again in a minute.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.set_tok: Save the personal mod token before creating a world.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.must_se: You must save the personal mod token before creating a world.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.match_n: Match is waiting for admin start.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.match_w: Match seed: %s. Waiting for admin start.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.qualifi: Manual seed is forbidden during qualification. Leave the seed field empty.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.match_s: Enter the match seed before creating the world: %s
Wrong seed. Use the match seed: %s
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.world_s: Could not read the world seed. The run will not start.
Wrong world seed. Create the world with seed: %s
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.test_ro: Test runs are disabled while the official tournament is active.
message.minecraft_speedrun_timer.run_ses: Run session was not found. Create a new tournament world.
Run session is already closed. This world cannot submit another result.
Run session expired. Create a new tournament world.
Run session belongs to another world. Create a new tournament world.
Tournament context changed. Create a new tournament world.
Could not register this world for a run session.
